programmes.show_description: (2021) Romantic drama with Odessa Young and Olivia Colman. In 1920s England a writer working as a maid has a passionate affair with the rich boy next door. It's not considered a good match.
What do the Goggleboxers think of Race Across the World, The Last of Us, MAFS Aus, WrestleMania, Chess Masters: The Endgame, Love on the Spectrum, and Secrets of the Penguins?
The Capture, Married at First Sight Australia and Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere are some of the shows on this time. And there's also Will and Ralf Should Know Better.

Teleshopping.
Kirstie and Phil help two sets of house-hunters who've relocated to Aberdeen for work and need to find new family homes fast.
Keith and Marj turn the old schoolroom into a snug, complete with a baroque chair and feature wall, before discovering Capel Salem's fiery past at the National Library of Wales.
On night one in Manchester, Pauline plans a snug soiree with plenty of home comforts and a family feel... but she forgets to serve one of her guests! (Ep1/5)
This week's competition kicks off in Falkirk, with mum and daughter Melissa and Fiona hosting at their cosy pub. Will a fridge-less room be their downfall?

programmes.show_name: A New Life in the Sun
programmes.show_description: Jen and Nick set up a horse charity, Brian and Paula give French life a second shot, and coffee bar owner James brings his business idea to Spain.

programmes.show_name: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programmes.show_description: Emma and her daughter Gracie are on a double house-hunt, for a new family home in the West Sussex countryside as well as a bolthole in Languedoc-Roussillon in the south of France.

programmes.show_name: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programmes.show_description: Bob and Judith, who have been married for over 40 years, can't agree on where their dream home should be: the rugged coastline of north Norfolk or the sunny beaches of the Costa Blanca.
Colchester. The first host, salesman Richard Massey, is banking on his signature dish of 'drunken duck' and his cheeky-chappy humour to bag him the prize. (Ep1/5)
Colchester. Smooth-talking PR man Darius rustles up a menu of local produce, including his own blackberry wine. But will his 'Roman Colchester' dress code be a hit? (Ep2/5)
Colchester. American army wife Adrena offers her guests an Armenian menu to reflect her heritage, and plans an Armenian egg fight for her guests' entertainment. (Ep3/5)
Colchester. IT consultant James Coe's sophisticated food is a hit from the get-go. But his constant chat about money is hard to stomach. (Ep4/5)
Colchester. It's the final day of the competition and vegetarian Jodie is out to wow her guests by giving them what they want: meat! If she can work up the courage to touch it... (Ep5/5)
Jean Johansson helps Andrea and Gary find their dream holiday home on the Caribbean island of St Lucia. What gems do they find for £205k and are any of them the one?
Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer go house-hunting in Derby and Nottingham for single mum Jo and adrenaline junkies Liz and John, who want a home big enough for all their sporting equipment.
George meets people taking on builds motivated by strong emotional ties. Chris, who has stage four cancer, and Ellie return to Chris's Ribble Valley roots to build a dream home.

programmes.show_name: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or...
programmes.show_description: ...List It: In Alnwick, Kirstie and Phil meet ministers Chris and Caroline, who need a divine intervention. Caroline loves their home and neighbours, but Chris craves more space.
The Capture, Married at First Sight Australia and Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere are some of the shows on this time. And there's also Will and Ralf Should Know Better.
A dangerous driver tries to flee the scene of a crash. An altercation between housemates needs some police attention. And Pete's copper's nose uncovers something unexpected.
PC Jodie and PC Zoe are called to break up a brawl between neighbours. And veteran officer Emma struggles to identify a child who's found wandering the streets late at night.
Roofer Simon has fallen two storeys onto concrete, Evelyn's burnt her finger on a cheese stick, and 97-year-old Doris is in resus with a fast heart rate.
The Coniston Mountain Team help a paraglider who's crash-landed on Great How Crag. And a man's gone missing around the tunnels of a disused quarry at Hodge Close. (Ep3/4)
A car fanatic unloads some of his beloved - and very valuable - classic car collection to raise retirement funds. And could a rare animal pelt keep a cash-strapped innkeeper afloat? (Ep3/3)
...Luxurious Cruises: A look behind the scenes aboard some of the world's most opulent cruise ships, where suites cost up to £8k a night and pets are as pampered as their people.
This time the Goggleboxers watch The Apprentice, Britain's Got Talent, Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing, Love Is Blind, Celebrity Puzzling, and Alexander Armstrong in India.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
In south London, Kirstie and Phil help Jo and Ally hunt for a family home. And Jennifer is looking for the purr-fect period property with outside space for her cats.
Taking inspiration from Coventry Cathedral, Keith and Marj create a Victorian-style parlour bathroom, complete with a giant candlestick holder and Marj's dream lampshade.
In Manchester, second host Richard treats his guests to a rich and indulgent menu. But will undergarment unearthing and a decadent dessert be too much for some? (Ep2/5)
At Cliff and Monika's place in the countryside near Loch Lomond, one B&Ber learns that maybe too much nature can be a bad thing in their jungle-themed room.

programmes.show_name: A New Life in the Sun
programmes.show_description: In France, Jen and Nick must dig deep to keep their horse charity going. And will Brian and Paula's new restaurant be ready in time for opening day?
Ben Hillman shows Mandy and Mick what the Costa Blanca has to offer for £240k, from beautiful balustrades to vivacious villas. But when each place surpasses the last, how will they choose?

programmes.show_name: A Place in the Sun: What...
programmes.show_description: ...Happened Next?: Jean Johansson revisits Lisa and Rob's barn conversion in Charente. And in Andalucia, Jasmine Harman catches up with Alison and Paula... and their hot tub.
Dudley. The first host, banker Mandeep Rajput, opts for a traditional Punjabi menu for his guests and some bhangra dancing for the entertainment. (Ep1/5)
Dudley. Pub quiz host Adam Reece plans a 'mixed up' night, with his guests being asked to attend in their pyjamas. The food is Italian, and there's gameshow-style fun for afters. (Ep2/5)
Dudley. Spoon-playing pensioner Di plans some honest home-cooking and civilised conversation. But Adam aims to take his sense of humour up a notch. (Ep3/5)
Dudley. Dog groomer Vicky Pell has high hopes for her cruise ship-themed dinner party. But it might not be plain sailing as a rift emerges between two of the guests. (Ep4/5)
Dudley. It's the final day of the competition, and 25-year-old businesswoman Sarah Freeman hopes that her Moroccan menu will drive her on to victory. (Ep5/5)
Married couple Mo and Anthony are looking for a holiday apartment with sea views in Torremolinos on Spain's Costa del Sol. Laura Hamilton shows them what their £130k budget can buy.
In the prime commuter territory of Hertfordshire, Kirstie and Phil help newly-engaged Liz and Neil in Tring and David and Claire in St Albans.

programmes.show_name: Aldi vs M&S: Battle of the Brands
programmes.show_description: It's posh versus upstart. From cakes to wine, Kate Quilton explores the ultimate British supermarket showdown. This isn't just any supermarket turf war... this is Aldi vs M&S. (Ep2)
